arm-linux-gnueabihf-gcc    CMakeFiles/sound.dir/sound.c.o  -o sound -Wl,-rpath,/home/ubuntu/opus-1.4/install_t113/lib:/home/ubuntu/alsa/install_t113/usr/lib:/home/ubuntu/openssl_arm_install/lib/libssl.a:/home/ubuntu/opus-1.4/install_t113/lib:/home/ubuntu/alsa/install_t113/usr/lib /home/ubuntu/opus-1.4/install_t113/lib/libopus.so /home/ubuntu/alsa/install_t113/usr/lib/libasound.so -lpthread -lm
